option.name: fileSummaryMaps
option.value: {"C:/Users/Максим/Desktop/betterbrushes-1.21-fabric-neoforge-template":"{\"/fabric/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/fabric/client/ExampleModFabricClient.java\":\"This file does not contain any classes or functions. Instead, it defines a `ClientModInitializer` interface implementation called `ExampleModFabricClient`. This class is responsible for setting up client-specific logic, such as rendering, when the Fabric-based mod is initialized on the client-side.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/netherite_brush_brushing_0.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a Netherite Brush item in the game.\\n\\nThe key elements of the configuration are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent model for the item, which is \\\"item/generated\\\".\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item, which is \\\"researcherstory:item/netherite_brush\\\".\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s display properties in different perspectives, including first-person left-hand, third-person right-hand, and third-person left-hand.\\n\\nThis configuration file is used to customize the appearance and behavior of the Netherite Brush item in the Minecraft game.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/gold_brush_brushing_2.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a specific item in the game. Here\\u0027s a summary of the file:\\n\\n`item/generated`: This is the parent model for the item, which means it inherits the basic properties of the \\\"generated\\\" item model.\\n\\n`textures`: This section defines the texture file to be used for the item\\u0027s appearance, in this case, \\\"researcherstory:item/gold_brush\\\".\\n\\n`display`: This section defines how the item should be displayed in different perspectives, such as first-person left-hand, third-person right-hand, and third-person left-hand. Each perspective has its own rotation, translation, and scale values to adjust the item\\u0027s position and size.\\n\\nOverall, this file is a configuration for a Minecraft item model, specifying its visual properties and behavior in different player perspectives.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/iron_brush.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of an item called \\\"iron_brush\\\" in the \\\"researcherstory\\\" mod. The key elements of the configuration are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies that this model inherits from the \\\"item/generated\\\" parent model.\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item.\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s visual representation in different perspectives (first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand).\\n`overrides`: Defines alternative models to be used based on the value of the \\\"brushing\\\" predicate, which likely represents the state of the item being used.\\n\\nOverall, this file sets up the visual and behavioral properties of a custom item in the Minecraft game.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/improved_feather.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file that defines the properties of an item in the Minecraft game. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties of the item, such as the texture to be used for the item\\u0027s appearance.\\n\\nThe file does the following:\\n\\n1. Specifies the \\\"parent\\\" property, which indicates that this item is based on the \\\"generated\\\" item model in Minecraft.\\n2. Defines the \\\"textures\\\" property, which specifies the texture file to be used for the item\\u0027s appearance, in this case, \\\"researcherstory:item/improved_feather\\\".\",\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/BetterBrushes.java\":\"This file is the main entry point for the \\\"BetterBrushes\\\" mod. It defines the mod\\u0027s ID and sets up the logging system, and it also initializes the mod\\u0027s items by calling the `registerModItems()` function from the `ModItems` class.\\n\\n`BetterBrushes`: The main class of the \\\"BetterBrushes\\\" mod, responsible for initializing the mod\\u0027s components.\\n\\n`init()`: Initializes the mod by registering the mod\\u0027s items.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/netherite_brush.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a \\\"netherite brush\\\" item. Here\\u0027s a summary of the key elements in the file:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies that this model inherits from the \\\"generated\\\" item model.\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item.\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s visual representation in different perspectives (first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand).\\n`overrides`: Defines alternative models for the item based on a \\\"brushing\\\" predicate, which likely represents the item\\u0027s usage state.\\n\\nOverall, this file is responsible for defining the visual and behavioral properties of a custom Minecraft item called the \\\"netherite brush\\\".\",\"/fabric/src/main/resources/fabric.mod.json\":\"This file appears to be a Fabric mod manifest, which is a JSON file that provides metadata about a Fabric mod. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the properties of the mod, such as its name, description, authors, contact information, license, dependencies, and more. The purpose of this file is to provide information about the mod to the Fabric Loader and other Fabric-based applications.\",\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/item/Brushes/Diamond_brush.java\":\"This file contains a single class `Diamond_brush` which extends the `BrushItem` class from the Minecraft API. The `Diamond_brush` class implements the behavior of a diamond brush item, including its use on blocks, particle effects, and sound effects.\\n\\n`Diamond_brush`: A class that represents a diamond brush item in the Minecraft game.\\n\\n`useOnBlock`: Handles the use of the brush item on a block, setting the player\\u0027s current hand and returning an `ActionResult`.\\n`getUseAction`: Returns the use action for the brush item, which is `UseAction.BRUSH`.\\n`getMaxUseTime`: Returns the maximum use time for the brush item, which is 200 ticks.\\n`usageTick`: Handles the usage of the brush item, including playing sound effects, adding particle effects, and brushing the block if it is a `BrushableBlock`.\\n`getHitResult`: Retrieves the hit result for the player\\u0027s block interaction range.\\n`addDustParticles`: Adds dust particle effects to the block being brushed.\\n`DustParticlesOffset`: A record class that represents the offset for dust particles based on the player\\u0027s rotation and the block\\u0027s side.\",\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/BetterBrushesClient.java\":\"This file appears to be a Fabric mod for Minecraft called \\\"BetterBrushes\\\" that is focused on the client-side implementation. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather serves as the entry point for the client-side initialization of the mod.\\n\\nThe file does the following:\\n\\n1. Imports the necessary classes and interfaces from the Fabric API and the mod\\u0027s own package.\\n2. Defines a class `BetterBrushesClient` that implements the `ClientModInitializer` interface from the Fabric API.\\n3. The `onInitializeClient()` method is overridden, which is called when the mod is initialized on the client-side. However, this method is currently empty, suggesting that the client-side initialization logic is likely implemented elsewhere in the mod.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/diamond_brush.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a diamond brush item. Here\\u0027s a summary of the key elements:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent model for this item, which is \\\"item/generated\\\".\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item, which is \\\"researcherstory:item/diamond_brush\\\".\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s display properties in different perspectives (first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand).\\n`overrides`: Defines alternative models for the item based on a \\\"brushing\\\" predicate, which likely represents the item\\u0027s usage state.\\n\\nOverall, this file sets up the visual and behavioral characteristics of a diamond brush item in a Minecraft mod or resource pack.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/iron_brush_brushing_2.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of an item called \\\"iron_brush\\\" in the \\\"researcherstory\\\" mod. The key elements are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies that this model inherits from the \\\"generated\\\" item model.\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item.\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s appearance in different perspectives, including first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand.\\n\\nThis file is used to customize the appearance and behavior of the \\\"iron_brush\\\" item in the Minecraft game.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/netherite_brush_brushing_2.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a Netherite Brush item in the game.\\n\\nThe key elements of the configuration are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent model for the item, which is \\\"item/generated\\\".\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item, which is \\\"researcherstory:item/netherite_brush\\\".\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s display properties in different perspectives, including first-person left-hand, third-person right-hand, and third-person left-hand.\\n\\nThis configuration file is used to customize the appearance and behavior of the Netherite Brush item in the Minecraft game.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/betterbrushes.mixins.json\":\"This file appears to be a Mixin configuration file for the \\\"Better Brushes\\\" Minecraft mod. Mixins are a way to modify the behavior of existing classes in a Minecraft mod without directly modifying the original code.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any class or function definitions. Instead, it specifies the following configuration settings:\\n\\n`required`: Indicates that this Mixin configuration is required for the mod to function.\\n`package`: Specifies the package name for the Mixin classes.\\n`compatibilityLevel`: Sets the Java version compatibility level to Java 21.\\n`minVersion`: Specifies the minimum version of the mod that this Mixin configuration is compatible with.\\n`client`: An empty list, indicating that this Mixin configuration is only for the client-side of the mod.\\n`mixins`: An empty list, indicating that no specific Mixin classes are defined in this configuration.\\n`injectors`: Specifies that the default Mixin injector should be used, with a required dependency level of 1.\\n\\nOverall, this file sets up the basic configuration for the Mixin system used by the \\\"Better Brushes\\\" mod, but does not define any specific Mixin classes or functions.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/diamond_brush_brushing_0.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a diamond brush item in the game. Here\\u0027s a summary of the file:\\n\\n`item/generated`: This is the parent model for the diamond brush item, which means it inherits the basic properties of the generated item model.\\n\\n`textures`: This section defines the texture layer for the diamond brush item, which is set to \\\"researcherstory:item/diamond_brush\\\".\\n\\n`display`: This section defines the visual properties of the diamond brush item in different perspectives, including first-person left-hand, third-person right-hand, and third-person left-hand. Each perspective has its own rotation, translation, and scale values.\",\"/fabric/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/fabric/ExampleModFabric.java\":\"This file is a Fabric mod initializer for the \\\"Better Brushes\\\" mod. It contains the following:\\n\\n`ExampleModFabric`: This class is the main entry point for the Fabric version of the \\\"Better Brushes\\\" mod.\\n\\n`onInitialize()`: This function is called when the Fabric mod is loaded, and it runs the common setup for the \\\"Better Brushes\\\" mod.\\n\\nThe file sets up the Fabric version of the \\\"Better Brushes\\\" mod by initializing the common setup code defined in the `ExampleMod` class.\",\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/item/ModModelPredicates.java\":\"This file does not contain any classes. It contains the following functions:\\n\\n`ModModelPredicates()`: This function registers model predicates for the iron, gold, diamond, and netherite brushes, which determine the appearance of the brushes while being used.\\n\\nThe file appears to be part of a Minecraft mod that adds custom brushes to the game. The `ModModelPredicates()` function is responsible for setting up the visual behavior of these brushes when they are being used by the player.\",\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/item/ModItems.java\":\"This file appears to be a Minecraft mod that adds various types of brushes as items. It does not contain any classes, but it does have the following functions:\\n\\n`registerItem`: This function registers a new item with the Minecraft registry using the provided name and item instance.\\n\\n`registerModItems`: This function logs a message indicating that the mod items are being registered, but it does not actually perform any registration. The registration of the items is done directly in the file, using the `registerItem` function.\\n\\nThe file defines the following items:\\n\\n`IRON_BRUSH`: An iron brush item with a maximum durability of 100.\\n`GOLD_BRUSH`: A gold brush item with a maximum durability of 250.\\n`DIAMOND_BRUSH`: A diamond brush item with a maximum durability of 340.\\n`NETHERITE_BRUSH`: A netherite brush item with a maximum durability of 500.\\n`IMPROVED_FEATHER`: A generic improved feather item.\\n\\nOverall, this file is responsible for registering the various brush items that are part of the \\\"Better Brushes\\\" Minecraft mod.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/gold_brush_brushing_1.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a gold brush item in the game. The key elements are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent model for this item, which is \\\"item/generated\\\".\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item, which is \\\"researcherstory:item/gold_brush\\\".\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s rendering in different perspectives, including first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand.\\n\\nThis file is used to customize the appearance and behavior of the gold brush item in the Minecraft game.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/diamond_brush_brushing_1.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a diamond brush item in the game. The key elements are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent model for this item, which is \\\"item/generated\\\".\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item, which is \\\"researcherstory:item/diamond_brush\\\".\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s rendering in different perspectives, including first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand.\\n\\nThis file is used to customize the appearance and behavior of the diamond brush item in the Minecraft game.\",\"/fabric/.gradle/loom-cache/log4j.xml\":\"This file is an XML configuration for the Apache Log4j logging framework. It defines several appenders (output destinations) for logging, including the system console, a rolling log file, and a debug log file. It also sets the logging levels for various packages and the root logger.\\n\\n`Configuration`: Configures the logging system with various appenders and loggers.\\n\\n`Console`: Defines the console appender, which outputs logs to the system console with color-coded log levels.\\n\\n`Queue`: Defines the server GUI console appender, which outputs logs to a queue for the server GUI.\\n\\n`RollingRandomAccessFile`: Defines the latest.log and debug.log appenders, which output logs to rolling log files.\\n\\n`Loggers`: Sets the logging levels for the net.minecraft and cpw.mods.modlauncher.ClassTransformer packages, and configures the root logger to use the defined appenders.\",\"/neoforge/.gradle/loom-cache/log4j.xml\":\"This file is an XML configuration for the Apache Log4j logging framework. It defines several appenders (output destinations) for logging, including the system console, a rolling log file, and a debug log file. It also sets the logging levels for various packages and the root logger.\\n\\n`Configuration`: Configures the logging system with various appenders and loggers.\\n\\n`Console`: Defines the console appender, which outputs logs to the system console with color-coded log levels.\\n\\n`Queue`: Defines the server GUI console appender, which outputs logs to a queue for the server GUI.\\n\\n`RollingRandomAccessFile`: Defines the latest.log and debug.log appenders, which output logs to rolling log files.\\n\\n`Loggers`: Sets the logging levels for the net.minecraft and cpw.mods.modlauncher.ClassTransformer packages, and configures the root logger to use the defined appenders.\",\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/item/Brushes/Gold_brush.java\":\"This file contains a single class `Gold_brush` which is a subclass of `BrushItem`. The class handles the behavior of a gold brush item in a Minecraft-like game, including its usage, particle effects, and interaction with brushable blocks and entities.\\n\\n`Gold_brush`: A class that represents a gold brush item in the game, handling its usage, particle effects, and interaction with brushable blocks and entities.\\n\\n`useOnBlock`: Handles the action when the brush item is used on a block.\\n`getUseAction`: Returns the use action for the brush item.\\n`getMaxUseTime`: Returns the maximum use time for the brush item.\\n`usageTick`: Handles the behavior of the brush item during its use, including playing sounds, adding particle effects, and interacting with brushable blocks and entities.\\n`getHitResult`: Retrieves the hit result for the player using the brush item.\\n`addDustParticles`: Adds dust particle effects when the brush item is used on a block.\\n`DustParticlesOffset`: A record class that represents the offset for dust particles when the brush item is used.\",\"/neoforge/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/neoforge/ExampleModNeoForge.java\":\"This file appears to be a Minecraft mod implementation using the NeoForge modding framework. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather serves as the entry point for the mod. The file performs the following tasks:\\n\\n`ExampleModNeoForge`: This file is the main entry point for the \\\"ExampleMod\\\" Minecraft mod, which is implemented using the NeoForge modding framework.\\n\\nThe file initializes the \\\"ExampleMod\\\" by calling the `ExampleMod.init()` method, which likely sets up the mod\\u0027s functionality and registers it with the Minecraft game.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/gold_brush_brushing_0.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a gold brush item in the game. Here\\u0027s a summary of the file:\\n\\n`item/generated`: This is the parent model for the gold brush item, which means it inherits the basic properties of the generated item model.\\n\\n`textures`: This section defines the texture file to be used for the item\\u0027s layer0 (the main texture).\\n\\n`display`: This section defines the different ways the item should be displayed in the game, such as in the player\\u0027s first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand. Each display mode has its own rotation, translation, and scale values to adjust the item\\u0027s position and size.\\n\\nOverall, this file provides the necessary configuration to render the gold brush item in the Minecraft game world, with customized visual properties for different player perspectives.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/iron_brush_brushing_0.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of an item called \\\"iron_brush\\\" in the \\\"researcherstory\\\" mod. The key elements are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies that this model inherits from the \\\"generated\\\" item model.\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item.\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s appearance in different perspectives, including first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand.\\n\\nThis file is used to customize the appearance and behavior of the \\\"iron_brush\\\" item in the Minecraft game.\",\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/item/Brushes/Netherite_brush.java\":\"This file contains a single class `Netherite_brush` which is a subclass of `BrushItem`. The class handles the behavior of a netherite brush item in a Minecraft-like game, including its use on blocks, particle effects, and sound effects.\\n\\n`Netherite_brush`: A class that represents a netherite brush item in the game, with functionality for using the brush on blocks, playing sound effects, and displaying particle effects.\\n\\n`useOnBlock`: Handles the use of the brush on a block, setting the player\\u0027s current hand if the hit result is a block.\\n`getUseAction`: Returns the use action for the brush item, which is `UseAction.BRUSH`.\\n`getMaxUseTime`: Returns the maximum use time for the brush item, which is 200 ticks.\\n`usageTick`: Handles the usage of the brush item, playing sound effects, displaying particle effects, and calling the `brush` method on the block entity if it is a `BrushableBlockEntity`.\\n`getHitResult`: Retrieves the hit result for the player\\u0027s block interaction range.\\n`addDustParticles`: Adds dust particle effects to the world based on the block state and the player\\u0027s arm.\\n`DustParticlesOffset`: A record class that represents the offset for dust particles based on the player\\u0027s rotation and the block\\u0027s side.\",\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/item/Brushes/Iron_brush.java\":\"This file contains the implementation of the `Iron_brush` class, which is a subclass of the `BrushItem` class. The `Iron_brush` class represents a brush item in the game that can be used to interact with certain blocks and block entities.\\n\\n`Iron_brush`: A brush item that can be used to interact with brushable blocks and block entities.\\n\\n`useOnBlock`: Handles the use of the brush item on a block.\\n`getUseAction`: Returns the use action for the brush item.\\n`getMaxUseTime`: Returns the maximum use time for the brush item.\\n`usageTick`: Handles the usage of the brush item, including playing sounds, adding particles, and interacting with brushable blocks and block entities.\\n`getHitResult`: Retrieves the hit result for the player\\u0027s interaction with the brush item.\\n`addDustParticles`: Adds dust particles to the world when the brush item is used.\\n`DustParticlesOffset`: A record class that represents the offset for dust particles when the brush item is used.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/diamond_brush_brushing_2.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a diamond brush item in the game. The key elements are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent model for this item, which is \\\"item/generated\\\".\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item, which is \\\"researcherstory:item/diamond_brush\\\".\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s display properties in different perspectives, including first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand.\\n\\nThis file is used to customize the appearance and behavior of the diamond brush item in the Minecraft game.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/gold_brush.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a gold brush item. Here\\u0027s a summary of the key elements:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent model for this item, which is \\\"item/generated\\\".\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item, which is \\\"researcherstory:item/gold_brush\\\".\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s display properties in different perspectives (first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand).\\n`overrides`: Defines alternative models for the item based on a \\\"brushing\\\" predicate, which likely represents the item\\u0027s usage state.\\n\\nOverall, this file sets up the visual and behavioral characteristics of a gold brush item in a Minecraft mod or resource pack.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/netherite_brush_brushing_1.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and behavior of a Netherite Brush item in the game.\\n\\nThe key elements of the configuration are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent model for the item, which is \\\"item/generated\\\".\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item, which is \\\"researcherstory:item/netherite_brush\\\".\\n`display`: Configures the item\\u0027s display properties in different perspectives, including first-person left-hand, third-person right-hand, and third-person left-hand.\\n\\nThis configuration file is used to customize the appearance and behavior of the Netherite Brush item in the Minecraft game.\",\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/CreativeTab/ItemGroupInit.java\":\"This file appears to be a Kotlin or Java file that defines a `CreativeTabsRegistry` class and a `STELLARIS_TAB` function. The file is responsible for registering a custom creative tab for the \\\"Better Brushes\\\" mod, which is likely a Minecraft mod.\\n\\n`CreativeTabsRegistry`: This class is responsible for managing the registration of custom creative tabs for the \\\"Better Brushes\\\" mod.\\n\\n`STELLARIS_TAB`: This function registers a new creative tab with the name \\\"Stellaris\\\" and sets the icon to be the \\\"Diamond Brush\\\" item from the \\\"ModItems\\\" class.\",\"/common/src/main/resources/assets/betterbrushes/models/iron_brush_brushing_1.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration for a Minecraft item model. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the visual properties and transformations for the item\\u0027s display in different perspectives (first-person left hand, third-person right hand, and third-person left hand).\\n\\nThe key elements in the file are:\\n\\n`parent`: Specifies the parent model for this item, which is \\\"item/generated\\\".\\n`textures`: Defines the texture layer for the item, which is \\\"researcherstory:item/iron_brush\\\".\\n`display`: Configures the transformations (rotation, translation, and scale) for the item\\u0027s display in different perspectives.\\n\\nThis file is likely used to customize the appearance and behavior of a specific item in a Minecraft mod or resource pack.\"}"}

option.name: fileSkeletonMaps
option.value: {"C:/Users/Максим/Desktop/betterbrushes-1.21-fabric-neoforge-template":"{\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/CreativeTab/ItemGroupInit.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/CreativeTab/ItemGroupInit.java\",\"file_name\":\"ItemGroupInit.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/item/Brushes/Diamond_brush.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/common/src/main/java/com/eirmax/betterbrushes/item/Brushes/Diamond_brush.java\",\"file_name\":\"Diamond_brush.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"Diamond_brush\",\"method_parameters\":\"(Item.Settings settings)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"settings\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[37,4],[39,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"useOnBlock\",\"method_parameters\":\"(ItemUsageContext context)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"ItemUsageContext\",\"name\":\"context\"}],\"return_type\":\"ActionResult\",\"scope\":[[41,4],[48,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getUseAction\",\"method_parameters\":\"(ItemStack stack)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"ItemStack\",\"name\":\"stack\"}],\"return_type\":\"UseAction\",\"scope\":[[50,4],[52,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getMaxUseTime\",\"method_parameters\":\"(ItemStack stack, LivingEntity user)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"ItemStack\",\"name\":\"stack\"},{\"type\":\"LivingEntity\",\"name\":\"user\"}],\"return_type\":\"int\",\"scope\":[[54,4],[56,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"usageTick\",\"method_parameters\":\"(World world, LivingEntity user, ItemStack stack, int remainingUseTicks)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"World\",\"name\":\"world\"},{\"type\":\"LivingEntity\",\"name\":\"user\"},{\"type\":\"ItemStack\",\"name\":\"stack\"},{\"type\":\"int\",\"name\":\"remainingUseTicks\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[58,4],[104,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getHitResult\",\"method_parameters\":\"(PlayerEntity user)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"PlayerEntity\",\"name\":\"user\"}],\"return_type\":\"HitResult\",\"scope\":[[106,4],[110,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"addDustParticles\",\"method_parameters\":\"(World
